title: Fault-Tolerant Watchdog FSM Safety Controller
description: Safety controller implementing NORMAL/DETECT/ISOLATE/RECOVER FSM with CRC16 command validation, triple-sensor median voting, EEPROM transition ring-buffer logging, RGB LED annunciator, and AVR hardware watchdog.
objective: Detect sensor anomalies within 100 ms; autonomously isolate and recover; persist all 16 FSM transitions to EEPROM; indicate state via RGB LED.
constraints: Arduino Uno; 3 analog sensors on A0-A2; 64-byte EEPROM ring; RGB LED on pins 9-11; 115200 UART.
supporting_fact_titles: Finite State Machine Fault Recovery Patterns

element_usage_notes.CRC16-CCITT Command Validator: Guards UART commands; 3 consecutive CRC errors trigger DETECT FSM event.
element_usage_notes.EEPROM Fault Transition Log: Persists 16 transitions for post-mortem analysis; read on boot.
element_usage_notes.Triple-Sensor Median Voter: Median voting; >10% deviation from median triggers fault event.
element_usage_notes.RGB FSM Status LED: Color-coded LED indicates current FSM state; blink rate = severity.

element_interactions.description: Voter deviation event dispatched through CRC-validated message path to FSM.
Valid transition logged to EEPROM ring buffer via fsm_transition.
LED colour updated on each logged FSM state transition.
Voter anomaly severity drives LED blink rate.
